title: Dungeon Crawl Feed
subtitle: Floor Broadcast // Princess Donut Network
footer: Dungeon management denies responsibility for curses, lava, celebrity felines, or emotional damage.

cards.speaker: Carl
cards.headline: Survivor's Note
cards.flavor: Filed after explosions, blood loss, and an argument nobody won.

cards.speaker: Carl
cards.headline: Field Report
cards.quote: Every floor finds a new way to be worse.
cards.flavor: Assessment delivered with the confidence of a man already running.

cards.speaker: Carl
cards.headline: Combat Doctrine
cards.quote: If the plan is stupid but it works, then the dungeon will probably make it worse.
cards.flavor: Tactical wisdom from a deeply unwilling professional.

cards.speaker: Carl
cards.headline: Morale Check
cards.quote: I am still alive, which I guess counts as progress.

cards.speaker: Carl
cards.headline: Operational Update
cards.quote: The trick is to keep moving before the nightmare notices you noticed it.
cards.flavor: Floor-tested advice with poor long-term outcomes.

cards.speaker: Carl
cards.headline: Stubbornness Buff
cards.quote: I'm too angry to die politely.
cards.flavor: The dungeon has rated this statement 'concerning but accurate.'

cards.speaker: Princess Donut
cards.headline: Royal Outrage
cards.flavor: A timeless judgment suitable for nearly any situation.

cards.speaker: Princess Donut
cards.headline: Formal Complaint
cards.flavor: Issued with full sovereign authority and zero patience.

cards.speaker: Princess Donut
cards.headline: Public Statement
cards.quote: I refuse to participate in anything this tacky.
cards.flavor: Participation continued anyway, but not happily.

cards.speaker: Princess Donut
cards.headline: Royal Notice
cards.quote: I am a champion, not a coupon customer.
cards.flavor: Declared while demanding the premium option.

cards.speaker: Princess Donut
cards.headline: On Brand
cards.quote: I would like it noted that I was magnificent.
cards.flavor: The court agrees. The enemies did not survive to comment.

cards.speaker: Princess Donut
cards.headline: Consumer Alert
cards.quote: If this establishment had standards, we wouldn't be here.
cards.flavor: Review score: one claw out of five.

cards.headline: Active Quest
cards.objective: Move one unstable merchant across the food court without waking the clown nest.
cards.warning: Merchant may scream, bargain, and attract knives.

cards.headline: Side Quest
cards.objective: Retrieve Princess Donut's preferred grooming brush from a trapped vanity room.
cards.warning: Failure results in disappointment worse than poison.

cards.headline: Timed Event
cards.objective: Disable the cursed fountain before it spawns another wave of opera goblins.

cards.headline: Errand of Doom
cards.objective: Convince three rival vendors not to start a grenade war during peak hours.
cards.reward: 2900 XP, discount voucher, trap wire bundle
cards.warning: Diplomacy penalties apply if covered in fresh gore.

cards.headline: Public Service
cards.objective: Acquire acceptable monster-grade snacks before Mongo samples the locals.

cards.headline: Floor Objective
cards.objective: Collect five valid merchant seals while avoiding debt priests and paper cuts.

cards.headline: Emergency Contract
cards.objective: Deliver one heavily perfumed noble through a war corridor with zero visible panic.

cards.headline: Bonus Objective
cards.objective: Climb the old ad tower and vandalize the boss image before the cameras rotate back.

cards.headline: Boss Rewards
cards.boss_status: Banished through the gift shop skylight

cards.headline: Boss Rewards
cards.bonus: Prices lowered 3% for exactly six minutes.

cards.headline: Boss Rewards
cards.bonus: Complaining now has a 4% loot chance.

cards.headline: Boss Rewards
cards.bonus: Mysterious whispering reduced to tolerable levels.

cards.headline: Boss Rewards
cards.bonus: One merchant now fears you on sight.

cards.headline: Store Prices
cards.note: All sales final. Screaming at staff incurs a handling fee.

cards.headline: Store Prices
cards.note: No prescription required. Survival not guaranteed.

cards.headline: Store Prices
cards.note: Cheap options are disrespectful and will be ignored.

cards.headline: Store Prices
cards.note: Bundle discounts available after verified destruction.

cards.headline: Store Prices
cards.note: Species disclosure available upon legal demand only.

cards.headline: Store Prices
cards.note: Store credit offered for lightly used mechanisms.

cards.headline: Loot Receipt
cards.warning: Receipt void if smudged by gore.

cards.headline: After Action Receipt
cards.warning: Tax not included. Blood tax applies separately.

cards.headline: Achievement Unlocked
cards.flavor: Awarded for surviving a situation clearly designed by a lunatic.

cards.headline: Achievement Unlocked
cards.effect: +8 merchant intimidation, discount chance increased slightly
cards.flavor: You entered the shopping district and somehow became the problem.

cards.headline: Achievement Unlocked
cards.effect: Pet loyalty boosted, fear radius widened
cards.flavor: A rare honor accompanied by property damage.

cards.headline: Achievement Unlocked
cards.effect: +12 reputation, +10 chaos, cameras fixate on you
cards.flavor: The dungeon has stopped pretending you are manageable.
